## Initiative 4: Wellness & Services

**Status:** Todo  
**Priority:** Medium  
**Due Date:** July 26, 2026  
**Owner:** Frontend Developer  
**Branch:** `feature/wellness-services`  

### Description
Showcase premium wellness, concierge, and relocation services with detailed information, booking systems, and testimonials.

### Subtasks

- [ ] Design wellness services cards
- [ ] Create concierge service pages
- [ ] Build relocation consultation forms
- [ ] Add service booking system
- [ ] Create testimonials/reviews section
- [ ] Implement service comparison tables
- [ ] Add FAQ section for each service
- [ ] Create staff/team bios
- [ ] Integrate contact forms for inquiries
- [ ] Set up service calendar/availability

### Services to Showcase

#### 1. Wellness Services
- Personal health programs
- Fitness coaching
- Nutrition planning
- Mental health support
- Spa & relaxation

#### 2. Concierge Services
- 24/7 support
- Event planning
- Travel arrangements
- Dining reservations
- Entertainment access

#### 3. Relocation Services
- Moving assistance
- Settlement support
- Local orientation
- Documentation help
- Community integration

### Acceptance Criteria

- ✅ All three service categories are well-presented
- ✅ Booking forms collect necessary information
- ✅ Testimonials section includes at least 5 reviews
- ✅ FAQ sections address common questions
- ✅ Staff bios are complete with photos
- ✅ Mobile responsive
- ✅ Accessibility compliant
- ✅ Forms have validation and confirmation messages
